[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000010 2
1 10010111 5
2 10110111 6
3 00001100 2
4 01001010 3
5 01000000 1
6 00111010 4
7 00101011 4

01 10 10100111 5
12 21 10010111 5 match 1
23 32 10110111 6 match 2
34 43 10111111 7
45 54 11101011 6
56 65 11011111 7
67 76 11011111 7
70 07 10101111 6

02 20 10110111 6 match 2
13 31 10110111 6 match 2
24 42 10111111 7
35 53 11111111 a
46 64 11111111 a
57 75 11001101 5
60 06 11110111 7
71 17 10001111 5

03 30 10110111 6 match 2
14 41 10101011 5
25 52 11011111 7
36 63 11110111 7
47 74 10101111 6
50 05 11101111 7
61 16 11010111 6
72 27 10011111 6

04 40 00101111 5
15 51 11001010 4
26 62 11010111 6
37 73 10111111 7
